query: I need to understand what happens when you POST /api/part/ with a `category` that doesn't exist — does it return 400 or 404? Can you hit the demo and write a TC for it with the actual response body?
probe the part categories api and document what fields come back on GET /api/part/category/ — I need observed response shapes before the automation team writes assertions
we noticed that deleting a part via DELETE /api/part/{pk}/ sometimes returns 204 and sometimes something else depending on stock. can you check a few cases on the demo and write manual TCs?
I need TC-APFLT test cases for filtering parts by the `active` flag combined with `category` — probe GET /api/part/?active=true&category=15 and similar combinations on demo.inventree.org
not sure if the inventree stock endpoint paginates by default or dumps everything — can you explore /api/stock/item/ and write a few test cases documenting the pagination behavior?
what does a 401 vs 403 look like on the parts api? check both unauthenticated and authenticated-but-read-only requests to POST /api/part/ and write TCs showing the real response bodies
I'm seeing `part_count: null` on newly created categories but `part_count: 0` after a PATCH. can you confirm this behavior on the demo API and write a TC capturing the difference?
need manual test cases for relational integrity — specifically what happens when you PATCH /api/part/{id}/ with a `default_location` PK that doesn't exist. probe it and document the actual error
explore the InvenTree pricing API at /api/part/sale-price/ and /api/part/purchase-price/ — I need to understand the response shapes and write TC-APPRICE test cases from live observations
can you look at how the search param works on GET /api/part/?search=enclosure and write TCs for search behavior including partial match, case sensitivity, and empty result set?
write a REST Assured test for TC-APCRUD-003 — the one that checks GET /api/part/{id}/ with ?parameters=true returns the parameters array
can you review PartCrudTest.java and check whether the assertions in testGetPartWithParameters() actually match what the manual TC says we should assert?
look at the InvenTree docs at https://docs.inventree.org/en/stable/part/ and summarize what fields are required when creating a part
update TC-APVAL-002.md to add a step that verifies the DRF error format has the field name as the key and an array of strings as the value
I want to explore the parts creation form in the browser UI — can you navigate to demo.inventree.org and document what fields are shown and which are required?
generate 20 test parts via the API so we have seed data for the load test tomorrow — just create them with sequential names like TestPart-001 through TestPart-020
what's the difference between `is_template` and `variant_of` in the InvenTree part model? I'm trying to understand the data model before writing tests
look at test-cases/api/parts/ and tell me which TC IDs are listed in index.md but don't have corresponding .md files yet
fix the failing PartPricingTest.java — the test is getting a 404 on GET /api/part/82/pricing/ but I'm not sure why
I need to write a DataProvider in TestNG that feeds different category IDs into a parameterized test for part creation — how should I structure it?
